channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on top of litter bin, 2nd May
item.description:
Pls remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Rise, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dog poo left in children's playground, 2nd May
item.description:
This is the third time I have seen dog poo in the children's playground. This is very dangerous as could cause illness. Please can the council do more to prevent this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed thrown on the road, 2nd May
item.description:
Again someone is throwing their rubbish there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimmeridge Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pavement clutter, 2nd May
item.description:
Having had a mobility vehicle blocking the path for years there is now two with second added which is seriously encroaching on the pavement and would be extremely difficult for anyone with limited mobility to pass as there is a tree the otherside. Also it is tipped on a dangerous angle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 194,196,198, Trafalgar Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes are still blocking the crossing, 2nd May
item.description:
Despite the bike storage locker being relocated further along the road, the same issue persists. Bikes are still being left in a way that completely blocks the crossing. This creates a serious safety hazard, particularly for visually impaired pedestrians who rely on tactile paving, as well as for anyone with reduced mobility, including wheelchair users or those using walking aids. The current location is clearly unsuitable. The bike storage needs to be moved to a different position, away from the crossing, to prevent obstruction and ensure safe access for all pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Regent's Park Road, Chalk Farm, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree, 2nd May
item.description:
Tree has partly fallen in alleyway and is dangerous to walk under

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bench, 2nd May
item.description:
Broken bench

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensdown Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 2nd May
item.description:
Litter around bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped binbags and builders rubble, 2nd May
item.description:
Persistent problem with people dumping bin bags by this tree but also 2m away opposite Nisa. Foxed have got at them and rubbish is all over the road. In the background of this pic leaning up against the estate you can see a load of dumped doors and wood.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken planters, 2nd May
item.description:
Planters are broken, untended and unkempt. Look dreadful and need attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Lansdowne Way, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The green light on the right pole is out. The left pole is twisted and facing the wrong way., 2nd May
item.description:
Traffic lights here have multiple faults. The green light on the right hand side pole doesn’t appear to be working. And the lights on the left side are twisted and facing the wrong direction. Traffic can’t see when the lights are green.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chalk Farm Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn end of Dartmouth rd near electric car charging place. grossly overgrown hedge to corner garden in exeter rd with or, 2nd May
item.description:
Overgrown hedge obstructing pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: Corner of Fitzroy & Regents Park Rd, 2nd May
item.description:
Issue FixMyStreet ref: 9317178 was closed mentioning a team will attend. All they did was put up a couple of plastic barriers that have since spent the whole time on the floor. This needs to be repaired and made safe before someone falls over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Fitzroy Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 2nd May
item.description:
Hi all, There is an abandoned van at the top of our road, which has been there for a couple of months or so. It has no MOT so is not drivable. No-one on the road has claimed it as theirs (on our WhatsApp group), so we presume it has been dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montbelle Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near no 34 Malden Rd, 2nd May
item.description:
The traffic island here has been hit and completely destroyed. It needs to be repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Malden Road, Chalk Farm, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycling lane not clean, 2nd May
item.description:
There has been debris in the cycle lane for several weeks, including rubbish, metal pieces, and stones. This is very dangerous for cyclists as it can cause punctures or accidents. The lane is currently not safe to use.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridgebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Colored rubbish bags on walworth road, 2nd May
item.description:
A lot of colored rubbish bags are left over on the footway on walworth road at lp 29 outside 213.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175A, Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags of rubbish on walworth road, 2nd May
item.description:
There are more than 10 balck bags of rubbish left over on walworth road at lp 25 outside sam pound store.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 187A, Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin liner full of garden waste. Vicarage Grove, 2nd May
item.description:
Day 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Hazardous POTHOLES in Perry St opposite Leas Green., 2nd May

Hazardous POTHOLES in Perry St opposite Leas Green.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
